name: Fateful Love
overview: Through unexpected circumstances, an illegitimate daughter, Han Ziqing, crosses paths with Jun Beiye, a prince known as the God of War. Drawn into national conflicts, they face off against various factions together. Despite her low status as the prime minister’s illegitimate daughter, Jun Beiye, who is feared for his battle prowess, chooses to protect her, revealing a deep devotion beneath his ruthless exterior.

trailers.title: [ENGSUB] 🔥 Fateful Love (2024) Trailer | Liu Guang Yin | Staring Zhu Xu Dan & Zhang Han | 流光引
